text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking around for Trainer Kiryuin to invite
her out for the day, when...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Now let's focus on timing. Lightly plant your toes,
and use your right foot as a pivot point.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: My right foot...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Correct. Keep your movements small, and
remember to stay flexible.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: How about it? Do you think you can do it?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Let me think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying that, Happy Meek moves over by the
window.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At a glance, it appears like she's just staring
blankly at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Trainer Kiryuin watches her placidly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This continues on, undisturbed, for about thirty
minutes.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer <username>!
Nice to see you!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Something akin to visualization.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
She likes to imagine her own movements while
gazing up at the sky. That's just how she's always
done it.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is watch over her until she feels she's
got it.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
As per the Trainer's Handbook, "One should
respect the heart of an Umamusume."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, another thirty minutes pass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Happy Meek returns, she performs the
dance flawlessly.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Surprised?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks. That's one of her many talents.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Once she's able to visualize something, she can
do it perfectly without any further issues.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course, she still needs the physical prowess to
perfectly execute the movements in her head.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But since she's always training hard, that's no
problem for her.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: It's no easy task to keep working like that.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I really respect her, from the bottom of my heart.
choice_data_list: I understand that feeling very well.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: You do?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Having a respectable trainee is one of the
greatest joys a trainer can experience, wouldn't
you say?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But... there's another person who I also respect.
Someone very close by, in fact.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's a little embarrassing... Let's just say it's
a secret.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>.
From here on out, both as peers and as rivals...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Let's keep giving it our best!
